title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!
